name: document_id_present
expression: document_id IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(document_id)) > 0
description: Every extracted record must carry a document_id — system invariant required for lineage tracking, audit trail, and deduplication

name: avg_confidence_acceptable
description: Overall extraction confidence below 0.68 indicates the filing may be a low-quality scan, handwritten, or in an unsupported format; route to quarantine for human review

name: filing_type_valid_enum
description: Filing type must be a recognized enumeration; invalid values break routing to litigation management and e-discovery workflows

name: case_number_not_null
expression: case_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(case_number)) > 0
description: Case number is the primary docket identifier; records without a case number cannot be linked to a matter or tracked in litigation management systems

name: court_name_present
expression: court_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(court_name)) > 0
description: Court name is required to determine jurisdiction, applicable rules, and routing to the correct legal team; absence triggers review

name: filing_date_present
description: Filing date is required to calculate deadlines, statutes of limitations, and response windows; absence prevents deadline management

name: hearing_date_after_filing
expression: hearing_date IS NULL OR filing_date IS NULL OR hearing_date >= filing_date
description: Hearing date cannot precede filing date; inversion indicates a date extraction error and flags the record for human review
